strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, including Nest.js and Vitest
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and code generators
Diverse polyglot background (TypeScript, Kotlin/Java, DLang, C++, etc.) with strong problem-solving adaptability
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and MySQL in recent roles, though earlier roles mention them
No explicit mention of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) certifications or deep hands-on experience in listed roles
Primary resume focus on open-source and smaller-scale projects, with less emphasis on enterprise-scale scalability
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript and React, along with niche expertise in AI-agent tooling and polyglot programming. His history of open-source contributions and startups suggests creativity and adaptability, though his exposure to enterprise-scale cloud infrastructure and primary database systems (PostgreSQL/MySQL) appears limited in recent roles. His communication and community engagement (talks, workshops) align well with user-centric delivery.
